filter_definitions.canonical_distinct_deal_key: select count(distinct coalesce(cast(player_id as varchar),'?')||'|'||coalesce(cast(season as varchar),'?')||'|'||coalesce("window",'?')||'|'||coalesce(from_club_name,'?')||'|'||coalesce(to_club_name,'?')) from transfers_canonical
filter_definitions.canonical_duplicate_transfer_uid_rows: select coalesce(sum(cnt-1),0) from (select transfer_uid, count(*) cnt from transfers_canonical group by 1 having count(*)>1)
filter_definitions.exact_transfer_date_rows: select count(*) from transfers_canonical where date_source in ('exact','exact_raw')
filter_definitions.market_value_nonnull_rows: select count(*) from transfers_canonical where market_value_eur is not null
filter_definitions.market_value_pit_rows: select count(*) from transfers_canonical where mv_is_point_in_time
filter_definitions.player_id_null_rows: select count(*) from transfers_canonical where player_id is null
filter_definitions.positive_fee_rows_all_types: select count(*) from transfers_canonical where fee_eur > 0
filter_definitions.positive_fee_rows_paid_permanent: select count(*) from transfers_canonical where transfer_type='permanent' and fee_eur > 0
filter_definitions.proxy_transfer_date_rows: select count(*) from transfers_canonical where date_source='proxy'
filter_definitions.trainable_fee_rows_current_filter: select count(*) from transfers_canonical where fee_eur > 0 and market_value_eur is not null and player_age is not null and coalesce(fee_suspect,false)=false
filter_definitions.undated_transfer_rows: select count(*) from transfers_canonical where transfer_date is null and date is null
